turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling billing support, my name is Sam. How can I help today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To pull up your account, could you give me the billing email please?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Sure, it's under my name and the usual email I sign in with.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I got charged twice this month and I only have one subscription.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hear you. Let me see what's posted on the account this cycle.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: So one of these looks like a duplicate. I can flag it for a refund.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: So how long is it going to take to fix?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I just want to make sure this doesn't happen again next month.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This is the third time I've called. Put me through to a manager.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's fair. I'll escalate this to a manager so we can sort it properly.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I've applied the refund and you'll see it in three to five days. Anything else?
